parameters.functionCode: const lead = items[0].json; const message = (lead.message || '').toLowerCase(); let priority = 'medium'; if (message.includes('urgent') || message.includes('budget')) priority = 'high'; if (message.includes('student') || message.includes('internship')) priority = 'low'; return [{ json: { ...lead, priority, owner: priority === 'high' ? 'sales-owner-a' : 'sales-owner-b', human_review_required: true } }];

meta.description: Demo workflow only. Add credentials inside n8n before production use. Human review is required before commercial routing or follow-up.
